description: Minimal worktree team: explorer decomposes, implementer arms run, judge gates merges, integrate. No test-writer, no code-review. For prototypes where CI or a human handles QA but you still want a judge gate before integration.

feature.description: What is being built — be specific enough for the explorer to decompose

plan.description: Path to a plan file or description of what to build. Explorer reads this first.

lint_cmd_default.description: Default lint command. /spawn sets this from the detected stack profile. Leave empty and the explorer will pick one per arm.

base_branch.description: The branch to merge integration/{team} back into after all work is done

implementer_model.description: Model for implementer arms. Default Sonnet works out-of-the-box. For ~3x cost savings at similar quality, set to gpt-4o-mini (requires Codex CLI).

steps.title: [{{team}}] explore + decompose: {{feature}}
steps.description: Map the codebase for {{feature}}. Decompose into implementer arms with non-overlapping file boundaries. Bond one implement-arm per arm. Set cross-arm dependencies in beads where arm B needs arm A's output. Report decomposition to orchestrator. Model: haiku.

steps.title: [{{team}}] judge: verify all implementations
steps.description: Judge all implementer arms (attempt 1 of 3). VERDICT: PASS unblocks integrate. VERDICT: FAIL → reopen failed arm(s), retry. Max 3 attempts. Model: sonnet. NOTE: judge-only mode — no test-writer or reviewers.

steps.title: [{{team}}] integrate: merge arms, merge to base branch, clean up
steps.description: 1. Create integration/{{team}}, merge all arm branches into it. 2. Verify build + tests on integration branch. 3. Push integration/{{team}} to origin. 4. Checkout base branch, merge integration/{{team}} into it, push base branch. 5. Delete all agent/{{team}}/* and integration/{{team}} local branches. 6. Remove all worktrees with bd worktree remove. 7. Close remaining open beads issues.
